title: crotalaria simplex
intro: Crotalaria simplex, also known as the yellow rattle, is a species of flowering plant in the pea family, Fabaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Crotalaria simplex include treating fever, cough, and respiratory problems, as well as having potential anti-cancer properties. Crotalaria simplex is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and decoctions, and is also used in Ayurvedic and traditional Chinese medicine to promote overall health and well-being.
